hero.title: Hello, I'm Faqih
hero.name: I'm a Full Stack Developer
hero.description: Blending 9 years of experience as an HR with Full Stack Development expertise. I help businesses digitally transform with innovative application solutions.

services.title: What
services.description: Here are some of the services that I offer to help you achieve your goals.

1.title: Full Stack Development
1.desc: Building modern web applications end-to-end with React, Next.js, Node.js, and more — from pixel-perfect UI to scalable backend infrastructure.

2.title: HR Digital Transformation
2.desc: 9 years of HR experience turned into digital solutions — HRIS, payroll systems, employee portals, and recruitment tools that actually match how HR teams work.

3.title: Business Process Automation
3.desc: Translating complex business workflows into efficient web applications — reducing manual work, minimizing errors, and increasing operational speed.

4.title: Collaboration & Consulting
4.desc: Bridging the gap between business needs and technical solutions — I understand both the human side and the code side, so nothing gets lost in translation.

about.title: Who
about.description: This is a brief introduction about myself and my background.
about.content: Bridging HR management and technology. With 9 years of experience as an HR practitioner and expertise in Full-Stack Development, I build digital solutions that truly understand how a business works. From modern web applications to complex internal systems, my focus isn't just on writing lines of code, but on developing effective solutions to solve operational problems for companies through the right technology.
about.add-desc-1: Turning complex ideas into functional digital experiences with deep enthusiasm and empathy.
about.add-desc-2: Continuously mastering modern tech stacks to deliver fast, scalable, and future-proof solutions.
about.add-desc-3: Ensuring every feature operates accurately and directly solves your real business challenges.

experience.title: My Experience
experience.description: My professional journey in HR and web development.

hr.Job-1: Leading the standardization and digitalization of HR processes—from recruitment, onboarding, and performance management to employee development—enhancing overall efficiency and the employee experience.
hr.Job-2: Led HR digital transformation through the implementation and optimization of HRIS. Actively involved in designing compensation structures to ensure internal equity and external market competitiveness.
hr.Job-3: Managed comprehensive compensation and benefits processes, including payroll, allowances, overtime, incentives, and BPJS, ensuring the company's competitiveness in attracting and retaining top talent.
hr.Job-4: Executed core HR administrative processes, including employee data management, contract administration, attendance tracking, and leave management, ensuring smooth and efficient daily HR operations.

tech.Job-1: Architecting and developing an HRIS system for HSI utilizing Next.js, React, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Supabase. Focused on building responsive and functional user interfaces to elevate the user experience in HR data management.
tech.Job-2: Participating in an intensive sandbox bootcamp mastering the Next.js framework and its ecosystem. Focused on developing real-world projects to solidify core concepts and best practices in modern web development.
tech.Job-3: Completed an intensive bootcamp on building AI-enabled applications using Python. Focused on practical projects that integrate AI models to solve real-world problems, while mastering foundational concepts in AI development.
tech.Job-4: Completed an intensive full-stack web development bootcamp mastering the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js). Focused on building hands-on projects to strengthen technical fundamentals and apply best practices.
tech.Job-5: Pursuing a degree in Informatics Engineering (Computer Science) to deepen my understanding of fundamental computing concepts, algorithms, data structures, and software engineering principles.
tech.Job-6: Started my journey in the tech industry through self-taught learning via various online resources, building a strong programming foundation starting from HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP.
